Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Legacy Irrigation to get the job done right.

“Our Midtown cottage's clay soil always caused drainage issues until Legacy installed a custom drip system. They added special sand channels that finally made our roses thrive despite 110°F summers. The team worked carefully around our historic brick walkways and even matched the tubing color to our mulch.”

Marisol G. Drip Irrigation Installation
Mar 15, 2025

“The Rachio controller Legacy installed saved us 40% on our water bill last summer. When that September heat wave hit, it automatically increased watering just enough to keep our Japanese maple alive without wasting water. Best part? Getting SMUD rebate paperwork handled for us.”

Devon K. Smart Controller Upgrade
Jan 22, 2025

“Called at 7am when a broken line flooded our Rocklin backyard before a 105°F day. They had a crew out by 10am who not only fixed the PVC crack but found two other weak spots we didn't know about. No upcharge for emergency service - just honest pros who know Sacramento systems inside out.”

Lien T. Sprinkler System Repair
Nov 7, 2024

“Legacy designed an ingenious system for our odd-shaped Land Park lot with shady oaks and full-sun rose beds. The zoning accounts for how Sacramento's angle of sunlight changes seasonally. Two years later, everything grows perfectly with minimal water waste - even during drought restrictions.”

Andre W. New System Design
Sep 18, 2024

“Their fall blowout service saved our pipes when that freak November freeze hit. While neighbors were repairing broken lines, ours worked perfectly. Now we religiously book their bi-annual checkups - worth every penny in Sacramento's extreme weather swings.”

Sophia R. Seasonal Maintenance
Jul 30, 2024

“Converting our 1980s sprinklers to drip was seamless. The crew pre-marked all utility lines (crucial in our older East Sac neighborhood) and finished a day early. Our water bill dropped 60% while the garden looks better than ever - even with mandatory conservation measures.”

Carlos M. Drip Irrigation Retrofit
May 12, 2024
Legacy Irrigation

Trusted irrigation professionals serving Sacramento, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
